title: A Dual-Helix Governance Approach Towards Reliable Agentic AI for WebGIS Development
summary: arXiv:2603.04390v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: WebGIS development requires rigor, yet agentic AI frequently fails due to five large language model (LLM) limitations: context constraints, cross-session forgetting, stochasticity, instruction failure, and adaptation rigidity. summary: GPT-5.4 is OpenAI's most capable model yet, combining coding, computer operation, and reasoning in a single package for the first time. The article OpenAI launches GPT-5.4 Thinking and Pro combining coding, reasoning, and computer use in one model appeared first on The Decoder.

title: OpenAI Had Banned Military Use. The Pentagon Tested Its Models Through Microsoft Anyway
summary: Sources allege the Defense Department experimented with Microsoft’s version of OpenAI technology before the ChatGPT-maker lifted its prohibition on military applications.

title: ByteDance’s AI Ambitions Are Being Hampered by Compute Restraints and Copyright Concerns
summary: ByteDance’s new Seedance 2.0 AI video model seemed unstoppable—until heavy demand strained the company’s compute capacity and copyright complaints began piling up.
